params.name: 3-Faced Statue
params.source:
* Demon Chest (5%), FTH Master Scrolls (9.2%), Fragment Crafting (4.4%), Grandmaster Scrolls (2.1%), Lottery Machine (0.24%), Master Scrolls (1.9%), Wishing (0.16%)
* [[Indigent Nobleman]] (570k {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad}})
params.description:
On Apr 20, 1663, this once enshrined prehistoric statue was unearthed.

The 3-faced God, a fearless deity who had the audacity to fight against Sakra in ancient times. It was carved from non-local ocher oolitic limestone. 

The statue has three different heads. Here's what the Dirghagama-sutra says about the 3-faced God: Tall, large, with the sun and the moon in two hands, lives under the sea by Mount Meru, three heads, eight arms, strides across mountains and oceans, like a skyscraping pillar t …
